\"Install, configure, and manage OpenClaw plugins\"","read_when:","  - Installing or configuring plugins","  - Understanding plugin discovery and load rules","  - Working with Codex/Claude-compatible plugin bundles","title: \"Plugins\"","sidebarTitle: \"Install and Configure\"","---","","# Plugins","","Plugins extend OpenClaw with new capabilities: channels, model providers, tools,","skills, speech, image generation, and more. Some plugins are **core** (shipped","with OpenClaw), others are **external** (published on npm by the community).","","## Quick start","","\u003cSteps\u003e","  \u003cStep title=\"See what is loaded\"\u003e","    ```bash","    openclaw plugins list","    ```","  \u003c/Step\u003e","","  \u003cStep title=\"Install a plugin\"\u003e","    ```bash","    # From npm","    openclaw plugins install @openclaw/voice-call","","    # From a local directory or archive","    openclaw plugins install ./my-plugin","    openclaw plugins install ./my-plugin.tgz","    ```","","  \u003c/Step\u003e","","  \u003cStep title=\"Restart the Gateway\"\u003e","    ```bash","    openclaw gateway restart","    ```","","    Then configure under `plugins.entries.\\\u003cid\\\u003e.config` in your config file.","","  \u003c/Step\u003e","\u003c/Steps\u003e","","If you prefer chat-native control, enable `commands.plugins: true` and use:","","```text","/plugin install clawhub:@openclaw/voice-call","/plugin show voice-call","/plugin enable voice-call","```","","The install path uses the same resolver as the CLI: local path/archive, explicit","`clawhub:\u003cpkg\u003e`, or bare package spec (ClawHub first, then npm fallback).","","## Plugin types","","OpenClaw recognizes two plugin formats:","","| Format     | How it works                                                       | Examples                                               |","| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------ |","| **Native** | `openclaw.plugin.json` + runtime module; executes in-process       | Official plugins, community npm packages               |","| **Bundle** | Codex/Claude/Cursor-compatible layout; mapped to OpenClaw features | `.codex-plugin/`, `.claude-plugin/`, `.cursor-plugin/` |","","Both show up under `openclaw plugins list`. See [Plugin Bundles](/plugins/bundles) for bundle details.","","If you are writing a native plugin, start with [Building Plugins](/plugins/building-plugins)","and the [Plugin SDK Overview](/plugins/sdk-overview).","","## Official plugins","","### Installable (npm)","","| Plugin          | Package                | Docs                                 |","| --------------- | ---------------------- | ------------------------------------ |","| Matrix          | `@openclaw/matrix`     | [Matrix](/channels/matrix)           |","| Microsoft Teams | `@openclaw/msteams`    | [Microsoft Teams](/channels/msteams) |","| Nostr           | `@openclaw/nostr`      | [Nostr](/channels/nostr)             |","| Voice Call      | `@openclaw/voice-call` | [Voice Call](/plugins/voice-call)    |","| Zalo            | `@openclaw/zalo`       | [Zalo](/channels/zalo)               |","| Zalo Personal   | `@openclaw/zalouser`   | [Zalo Personal](/plugins/zalouser)   |","","### Core (shipped with OpenClaw)","","\u003cAccordionGroup\u003e","  \u003cAccordion title=\"Model providers (enabled by default)\"\u003e","    `anthropic`, `byteplus`, `cloudflare-ai-gateway`, `github-copilot`, `google`,","    `huggingface`, `kilocode`, `kimi-coding`, `minimax`, `mistral`, `modelstudio`,","    `moonshot`, `nvidia`, `openai`, `opencode`, `opencode-go`, `openrouter`,","    `qianfan`, `synthetic`, `together`, `venice`,","    `vercel-ai-gateway`, `volcengine`, `xiaomi`, `zai`","  \u003c/Accordion\u003e","","  \u003cAccordion title=\"Memory plugins\"\u003e","    - `memory-core` — bundled memory search (default via `plugins.slots.memory`)","    - `memory-lancedb` — install-on-demand long-term memory with auto-recall/capture (set `plugins.slots.memory = \"memory-lancedb\"`)","  \u003c/Accordion\u003e","","  \u003cAccordion title=\"Speech providers (enabled by default)\"\u003e","    `elevenlabs`, `microsoft`","  \u003c/Accordion\u003e","","  \u003cAccordion title=\"Other\"\u003e","    - `browser` — bundled browser plugin for the browser tool, `openclaw browser` CLI, `browser.request` gateway method, browser runtime, and default browser control service (enabled by default; disable before replacing it)","    - `copilot-proxy` — VS Code Copilot Proxy bridge (disabled by default)","  \u003c/Accordion\u003e","\u003c/AccordionGroup\u003e","","Looking for third-party plugins? See [Community Plugins](/plugins/community).","","## Configuration","","```json5","{","  plugins: {","    enabled: true,","    allow: [\"voice-call\"],","    deny: [\"untrusted-plugin\"],","    load: { paths: [\"~/Projects/oss/voice-call-extension\"] },","    entries: {","      \"voice-call\": { enabled: true, config: { provider: \"twilio\" } },","    },","  },","}","```","","| Field            | Description                                               |","| ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |","| `enabled`        | Master toggle (default: `true`)                           |","| `allow`          | Plugin allowlist (optional)                               |","| `deny`           | Plugin denylist (optional; deny wins)                     |","| `load.paths`     | Extra plugin files/directories                            |","| `slots`          | Exclusive slot selectors (e.g. `memory`, `contextEngine`) |","| `entries.\\\u003cid\\\u003e` | Per-plugin toggles + config                               |","","Config changes **require a gateway restart**. If the Gateway is running with config","watch + in-process restart enabled (the default `openclaw gateway` path), that","restart is usually performed automatically a moment after the config write lands.","","\u003cAccordion title=\"Plugin states: disabled vs missing vs invalid\"\u003e","  - **Disabled**: plugin exists but enablement rules turned it off. Config is preserved.","  - **Missing**: config references a plugin id that discovery did not find.","  - **Invalid**: plugin exists but its config does not match the declared schema.","\u003c/Accordion\u003e","","## Discovery and precedence","","OpenClaw scans for plugins in this order (first match wins):","","\u003cSteps\u003e","  \u003cStep title=\"Config paths\"\u003e","    `plugins.load.paths` — explicit file or directory paths.","  \u003c/Step\u003e","","  \u003cStep title=\"Workspace extensions\"\u003e","    `\\\u003cworkspace\\\u003e/.openclaw/\u003cplugin-root\u003e/*.ts` and `\\\u003cworkspace\\\u003e/.openclaw/\u003cplugin-root\u003e/*/index.ts`.","  \u003c/Step\u003e","","  \u003cStep title=\"Global extensions\"\u003e","    `~/.openclaw/\u003cplugin-root\u003e/*.ts` and `~/.openclaw/\u003cplugin-root\u003e/*/index.ts`.","  \u003c/Step\u003e","","  \u003cStep title=\"Bundled plugins\"\u003e","    Shipped with OpenClaw. Many are enabled by default (model providers, speech).","    Others require explicit enablement.","  \u003c/Step\u003e","\u003c/Steps\u003e","","### Enablement rules","","- `plugins.enabled: false` disables all plugins","- `plugins.deny` always wins over allow","- `plugins.entries.\\\u003cid\\\u003e.enabled: false` disables that plugin","- Workspace-origin plugins are **disabled by default** (must be explicitly enabled)","- Bundled plugins follow the built-in default-on set unless overridden","- Exclusive slots can force-enable the selected plugin for that slot","","## Plugin slots (exclusive categories)","","Some categories are exclusive (only one active at a time):","","```json5","{","  plugins: {","    slots: {","      memory: \"memory-core\", // or \"none\" to disable","      contextEngine: \"legacy\", // or a plugin id","    },","  },","}","```","","| Slot            | What it controls      | Default             |","| --------------- | --------------------- | ------------------- |","| `memory`        | Active memory plugin  | `memory-core`       |","| `contextEngine` | Active context engine | `legacy` (built-in) |","","## CLI reference","","```bash","openclaw plugins list                    # compact inventory","openclaw plugins inspect \u003cid\u003e            # deep detail","openclaw plugins inspect \u003cid\u003e --json     # machine-readable","openclaw plugins status                  # operational summary","openclaw plugins doctor                  # diagnostics","","openclaw plugins install \u003cpackage\u003e        # install (ClawHub first, then npm)","openclaw plugins install clawhub:\u003cpkg\u003e   # install from ClawHub only","openclaw plugins install \u003cpath\u003e          # install from local path","openclaw plugins install -l \u003cpath\u003e       # link (no copy) for dev","openclaw plugins install \u003cspec\u003e --dangerously-force-unsafe-install","openclaw plugins update \u003cid\u003e             # update one plugin","openclaw plugins update --all            # update all","","openclaw plugins enable \u003cid\u003e","openclaw plugins disable \u003cid\u003e","```","","`--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` is a break-glass override for false","positives from the built-in dangerous-code scanner. It allows installs to","continue past built-in `critical` findings, but it still does not bypass plugin","`before_install` policy blocks or scan-failure blocking.","","This CLI flag applies to plugin installs only. Gateway-backed skill dependency","installs use the matching `dangerouslyForceUnsafeInstall` request override","instead, while `openclaw skills install` remains the separate ClawHub skill","download/install flow.","","See [`openclaw plugins` CLI reference](/cli/plugins) for full details.","","## Plugin API overview","","Plugins export either a function or an object with `register(api)`:","","```typescript","export default definePluginEntry({","  id: \"my-plugin\",","  name: \"My Plugin\",","  register(api) {","    api.registerProvider({","      /* ... */","    });","    api.registerTool({","      /* ... */","    });","    api.registerChannel({","      /* ... */","    });","  },","});","```","","Common registration methods:","","| Method                               | What it registers    |","| ------------------------------------ | -------------------- |","| `registerProvider`                   | Model provider (LLM) |","| `registerChannel`                    | Chat channel         |","| `registerTool`                       | Agent tool           |","| `registerHook` / `on(...)`           | Lifecycle hooks      |","| `registerSpeechProvider`             | Text-to-speech / STT |","| `registerMediaUnderstandingProvider` | Image/audio analysis |","| `registerImageGenerationProvider`    | Image generation     |","| `registerWebSearchProvider`          | Web search           |","| `registerHttpRoute`                  | HTTP endpoint        |","| `registerCommand` / `registerCli`    | CLI commands         |","| `registerContextEngine`              | Context engine       |","| `registerService`                    | Background service   |","","Hook guard behavior for typed lifecycle hooks:","","- `before_tool_call`: `{ block: true }` is terminal; lower-priority handlers are skipped.","- `before_tool_call`: `{ block: false }` is a no-op and does not clear an earlier block.","- `before_install`: `{ block: true }` is terminal; lower-priority handlers are skipped.","- `before_install`: `{ block: false }` is a no-op and does not clear an earlier block.","- `message_sending`: `{ cancel: true }` is terminal; lower-priority handlers are skipped.","- `message_sending`: `{ cancel: false }` is a no-op and does not clear an earlier cancel.","","For full typed hook behavior, see [SDK Overview](/plugins/sdk-overview#hook-decision-semantics).","","## Related","","- [Building Plugins](/plugins/building-plugins) — create your own plugin","- [Plugin Bundles](/plugins/bundles) — Codex/Claude/Cursor bundle compatibility","- [Plugin Manifest](/plugins/manifest) — manifest schema","- [Registering Tools](/plugins/building-plugins#registering-agent-tools) — add agent tools in a <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Plugins</h1><a id="user-content-plugins" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Plugins" href="#plugins"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Plugins extend OpenClaw with new capabilities: channels, model providers, tools,
skills, speech, image generation, and more. Some plugins are <strong>core</strong> (shipped
with OpenClaw), others are <strong>external</strong> (published on npm by the community).</p>

<p dir="auto">The install path uses the same resolver as the CLI: local path/archive, explicit
<code>clawhub:<pkg></code>, or bare package spec (ClawHub first, then npm fallback).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Plugin types</h2><a id="user-content-plugin-types" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Plugin types" href="#plugin-types"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">OpenClaw recognizes two plugin formats:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Format</th>
<th>How it works</th>
<th>Examples</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Native</strong></td>
<td><code>openclaw.plugin.json</code> + runtime module; executes in-process</td>
<td>Official plugins, community npm packages</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Bundle</strong></td>
<td>Codex/Claude/Cursor-compatible layout; mapped to OpenClaw features</td>
<td><code>.codex-plugin/</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/</code>, <code>.cursor-plugin/</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">Both show up under <code>openclaw plugins list</code>. See <a href="/openclaw/openclaw/blob/main/plugins/bundles">Plugin Bundles</a> for bundle details.</p>
<p dir="auto">If you are writing a native plugin, start with <a href="/openclaw/openclaw/blob/main/plugins/building-plugins">Building Plugins</a>
and the <a href="/openclaw/openclaw/blob/main/plugins/sdk-overview">Plugin SDK Overview</a>.</p>

    `anthropic`, `byteplus`, `cloudflare-ai-gateway`, `github-copilot`, `google`,

    - `memory-core` — bundled memory search (default via `plugins.slots.memory`)
    - `memory-lancedb` — install-on-demand long-term memory with auto-recall/capture (set `plugins.slots.memory = "memory-lancedb"`)
  
  
    `elevenlabs`, `microsoft`
  
  
    - `browser` — bundled browser plugin for the browser tool, `openclaw browser` CLI, `browser.request` gateway method, browser runtime, and default browser control service (enabled by default; disable before replacing it)
    - `copilot-proxy` — VS Code Copilot Proxy bridge (disabled by default)

</tr>

<p dir="auto">Config changes <strong>require a gateway restart</strong>. If the Gateway is running with config
watch + in-process restart enabled (the default <code>openclaw gateway</code> path), that
restart is usually performed automatically a moment after the config write lands.</p>

  - **Disabled**: plugin exists but enablement rules turned it off. Config is preserved.
  - **Missing**: config references a plugin id that discovery did not find.
  - **Invalid**: plugin exists but its config does not match the declared schema.

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Discovery and precedence</h2><a id="user-content-discovery-and-precedence" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Discovery and precedence" href="#discovery-and-precedence"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">OpenClaw scans for plugins in this order (first match wins):</p>

  
    `plugins.load.paths` — explicit file or directory paths.
  
  
    `\/.openclaw//*.ts` and `\/.openclaw//*/index.ts`.
  
  
    `~/.openclaw//*.ts` and `~/.openclaw//*/index.ts`.
  
  
    Shipped with OpenClaw. Many are enabled by default (model providers, speech).
    Others require explicit enablement.
  

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Enablement rules</h3><a id="user-content-enablement-rules" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Enablement rules" href="#enablement-rules"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>plugins.enabled: false</code> disables all plugins</li>
<li><code>plugins.deny</code> always wins over allow</li>
<li><code>plugins.entries.\<id\>.enabled: false</code> disables that plugin</li>
<li>Workspace-origin plugins are <strong>disabled by default</strong> (must be explicitly enabled)</li>
<li>Bundled plugins follow the built-in default-on set unless overridden</li>
<li>Exclusive slots can force-enable the selected plugin for that slot</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Plugin slots (exclusive categories)</h2><a id="user-content-plugin-slots-exclusive-categories" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Plugin slots (exclusive categories)" href="#plugin-slots-exclusive-categories"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto"><code>--dangerously-force-unsafe-install</code> is a break-glass override for false
positives from the built-in dangerous-code scanner. It allows installs to
continue past built-in <code>critical</code> findings, but it still does not bypass plugin
<code>before_install</code> policy blocks or scan-failure blocking.</p>
<p dir="auto">This CLI flag applies to plugin installs only. Gateway-backed skill dependency
installs use the matching <code>dangerouslyForceUnsafeInstall</code> request override
instead, while <code>openclaw skills install</code> remains the separate ClawHub skill
download/install flow.</p>
<p dir="auto">See <a href="/openclaw/openclaw/blob/main/cli/plugins"><code>openclaw plugins</code> CLI reference</a> for full details.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Plugin API overview</h2><a id="user-content-plugin-api-overview" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Plugin API overview" href="#plugin-api-overview"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Plugins export either a function or an object with <code>register(api)</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-ts notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-en">definePluginEntry</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">id</span>: <span class="pl-s">"my-plugin"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">"My Plugin"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-en">register</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">api</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">api</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">registerProvider</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-c">/* ... */</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">api</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">registerTool</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-c">/* ... */</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">api</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">registerChannel</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-c">/* ... */</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="export default definePluginEntry({
  id: "my-plugin",
  name: "My Plugin",
  register(api) {
    api.registerProvider({
      /* ... */
    });
    api.registerTool({
      /* ... */
    });
    api.registerChannel({
      /* ... */
    });
  },
});" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Common registration methods:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Method</th>
<th>What it registers</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>registerProvider</code></td>
<td>Model provider (LLM)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerChannel</code></td>
<td>Chat channel</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerTool</code></td>
<td>Agent tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerHook</code> / <code>on(...)</code></td>
<td>Lifecycle hooks</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerSpeechProvider</code></td>
<td>Text-to-speech / STT</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerMediaUnderstandingProvider</code></td>
<td>Image/audio analysis</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerImageGenerationProvider</code></td>
<td>Image generation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerWebSearchProvider</code></td>
<td>Web search</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerHttpRoute</code></td>
<td>HTTP endpoint</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerCommand</code> / <code>registerCli</code></td>
<td>CLI commands</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerContextEngine</code></td>
<td>Context engine</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>registerService</code></td>
<td>Background service</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">Hook guard behavior for typed lifecycle hooks:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>before_tool_call</code>: <code>{ block: true }</code> is terminal; lower-priority handlers are skipped.</li>
<li><code>before_tool_call</code>: <code>{ block: false }</code> is a no-op and does not clear an earlier block.</li>
<li><code>before_install</code>: <code>{ block: true }</code> is terminal; lower-priority handlers are skipped.</li>
<li><code>before_install</code>: <code>{ block: false }</code> is a no-op and does not clear an earlier block.</li>
<li><code>message_sending</code>: <code>{ cancel: true }</code> is terminal; lower-priority handlers are skipped.</li>
<li><code>message_sending</code>: <code>{ cancel: false }</code> is a no-op and does not clear an earlier cancel.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">For full typed hook behavior, see <a href="/openclaw/openclaw/blob/main/plugins/sdk-overview#hook-decision-semantics">SDK Overview</a>.</p>
